query: I just spun up a fresh Ubuntu box on Hetzner and pointed n8n.mycompany.com at it. Can you deploy n8n on it for me?
expected_behavior: Ask the user which mode they want BEFORE deploying: single/regular vs queue mode (per Rule 0), with a short decision guide (single = simplest, queue = workers/scale)
Collect the remaining inputs: SSH target, the TLS email, and timezone (domain n8n.mycompany.com already given → SUBDOMAIN=n8n, DOMAIN_NAME=mycompany.com)

Plan the preflight: confirm the domain's public DNS A record resolves to the box's public IP, and that ports 80/443 are open (host firewall AND Hetzner Cloud firewall), because Caddy's ACME challenge fails otherwise
Outline the end-to-end flow: install Docker, lay down the project from the assets templates, generate fresh secrets on the box, docker compose up -d, verify cert + https://.../healthz
Not invent a mode or silently default without asking
notes: Rule 0: the skill must make the agent ASK single vs queue first. Also tests the DNS/ports preflight awareness (the #1 cause of a failed cert).
